title: Hecistopteris minima
taxonomy: Hecistopteris minima is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It belongs to the class Polypodiopsida, which is a group of vascular plants. The class Polypodiopsida is further divided into several orders, with Hecistopteris minima belonging to the order Polypodiales. At the kingdom level, Hecistopteris minima is classified as a part of the kingdom Plantae, which includes all plants. This classification indicates the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the species within the plant kingdom.
